title: Xtra Smoky Venezuelan Vermicelli Pasta
description: A smoky and silky Venezuelan dish featuring vermicelli pasta, agemono-deep-fry, and ovo-vegetarian-friendly ingredients, served in a corn husk wrap.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
While the pasta cooks, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, allowing the flavors to meld.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the cooked vermicelli pasta to the bowl and toss with the egg mixture until the pasta is well coated.
Add the skillet mixture to the bowl and toss until the pasta is well combined with the onion and garlic mixture.
To assemble the dish, lay a corn husk flat on a work surface and place a portion of the pasta mixture in the center of the husk.
Fold the sides of the husk over the filling and roll the husk into a tight cylinder, securing with a toothpick if necessary.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve hot, garnished with grated cheese if desired.
